svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Control Loop System" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1144" dy="728" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;" value="Potentiometru
Target r(t)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="50" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;" value="ADC (PA3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="60" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="error" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;" value="Eroare
e = r(t) - y(t)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="60" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pid" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;" value="PID Controller
(STM32)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="240" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pwm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;" value="PWM (PA6)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="430" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mosfet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;" value="<div>REZISTOR 100Ω</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="600" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fan" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="Ventilator 12V" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="610" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="process" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d0e0e3;" value="Proces fizic P(s)
Mingea se mișcă" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="590" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sensor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;" value="VL53L0X
y(t)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="60" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fb" edge="1" parent="1" source="sensor" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;" target="error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pot" target="adc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="adc" target="error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" target="pid"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="pid" target="pwm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="pwm" target="mosfet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="mosfet" target="fan"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="fan" target="process"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="process" target="sensor"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="1. Citește senzor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="10" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="2. Citește potențiometru" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="190" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="3. Calculează eroare" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="370" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="4. PID" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="90" x="550" y="637.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="5. PWM → Ventilator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="660" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="we1" edge="1" parent="1" source="w1" target="w2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="we2" edge="1" parent="1" source="w2" target="w3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="we3" edge="1" parent="1" source="w3" target="w4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="we4" edge="1" parent="1" source="w4" target="w5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
